item.body: 🚨 STOP BURNING YOUR TOKENS! If you use Claude Code, you are probably wasting 80% of your context window. I found 10 ace tools that will completely rescue your API bill. 1. Caveman Claude - Literally makes Claude talk like a caveman - Slashes 75% of output tokens with zero… https://t.co/wzCP8JpvIn pic.twitter.com/Vhy3OqthVY
